title: Ubiquiti UT-G3-Handset, wireless handset for UTP G3 Phones
description: The Ubiquiti UT-G3-Handset is a wireless handset designed for third-generation UniFi VOIP phones, connecting via Bluetooth. The handset features Mute, Volume +/-, and call answer/end buttons. An integrated omnidirectional microphone and high-quality speaker ensure clear audio transmission. A long battery life is provided by a 1000 mAh Li-ion battery. The handset replaces the original wired receiver and charges directly through the phone UTP-G3-Touch-Pro UTP-G3-Touch-Enterprise UTP-G3-Wall
